name: Mecademic Meca500 Modified-DH home-calibrated candidate
source_note: Derived from the initial MDH model by applying a -2 mm correction to d6. This exactly matches the historical HOME_JOINTS initial_pose records, but must be validated using multiple live joint/TCP samples before final use.

calibration.evidence: Historical baseline reports record initial_pose after moving to HOME_JOINTS. Initial MDH FK matched rotation and X/Y, with a consistent 2 mm world-Z offset at HOME_JOINTS.

validation_required: Collect live GetRtTargetJointPos/GetRtTargetCartPos samples at multiple non-collinear joint states.
Confirm that the -2 mm d6 correction reduces position error across all poses, not only HOME_JOINTS.
Only then use this candidate model for URDF/MJCF finalization.
